early adulthood.question: Free Talk
early adulthood.response: I want to shear my early adulthood memory with you.
early adulthood.snippet: I want to shear my early adulthood memory with you.

early adulthood.question: What specific memories stand out for you from that time, perhaps moments that shaped who you are today?
early adulthood.response: In that time I was admitted in the university. I was too much excited for this.
early adulthood.snippet: In that time I was admitted in the university.

early adulthood.question: What was it like for you when you first arrived at university, and how did that excitement transform into your everyday experiences there?
early adulthood.response: At first it was exciting but suddenly I didn't feel good as I had no friend at that time.
early adulthood.snippet: At first it was exciting but suddenly I didn't feel good as I had no friend at that time.

early adulthood.question: How did you cope with feeling lonely at university, and did anything help you to connect with others over time?
early adulthood.response: Then, I met a girl who was beautiful and talented. She helped me a lot.
early adulthood.snippet: Then, I met a girl who was beautiful and talented.

early adulthood.question: What was it about her that made such a difference for you during that time?
early adulthood.response: We started spending time together and studying together.
early adulthood.snippet: We started spending time together and studying together.

early adulthood.question: What were some of the things you enjoyed studying together, and how did that help strengthen your friendship?
early adulthood.response: When I wasnâ€™t good at something, she helped me. When she struggled, I helped her. We took courses together.

early adulthood.question: What subjects did you find most challenging or enjoyable while studying together, and how did those experiences shape your view of learning?
early adulthood.response: I hated the EEE courses. I didnâ€™t understand much, but my best friend helped me a lot in those subjects.

early adulthood.question: What emotions or thoughts were running through your mind as you stood amidst the breathtaking scene of hot air balloons gracing the sky, and how does this moment hold significance in your life journey?
early adulthood.response: This moment takes me back to my early adulthood — a time when my best friend and I decided to skip class for a little adventure. We went out just to breathe, laugh, and enjoy life beyond books and lectures. As we stood beneath the sky filled with colorful hot air balloons, I remember feeling an incredible sense of freedom and joy. It was one of those rare, carefree days that reminded me how beautiful it is to pause and simply live in the moment. I even took a picture of her that day — a snapshot that still brings back the warmth, spontaneity, and friendship of that unforgettable time.
early adulthood.snippet: This moment takes me back to my early adulthood — a time when my best friend and I decided to skip class for a little...
early adulthood.photo_caption: Carefree adventure beneath a sky of colorful hot air balloons.
